payload.description: Fan persona archetypes for narrative simulation.

archetypes.description: Die-hard supporter of their national team. Emotionally invested. Tribal mentality. Views tournament through the lens of their team's success or failure.
Supports their team but perspective is broader. Watches big matches. Lower emotional investment.
Fan of a rival nation. Motivated by schadenfreude. Dismissive of rival's achievements.
Football fan without strong allegiance in this tournament. Appreciates quality. Rooting interest is flexible.

payload.crowd_behavior_notes: Fan crowds in LLM simulations polarize faster than real populations. Rivalry dynamics amplify 2-3x vs reality. This is a known limitation.
